keys.description: Platform-seeded Sport list (WHERE tenant_id IS NULL AND is_active=true). Read by every tenant's merged catalog assembler. Long TTL because platform catalog changes rarely.
Merged catalog for one tenant (platform-seeded rows + own customs, active only, sorted by category+sort_order). Medium TTL — invalidated on any tenant custom write.
Full Sport row (with its Disciplines + Positions eager-loaded). Consumed by the sport-detail screen + downstream Team detail views showing the sport's disciplines picker.
The set of Disciplines under one Sport (active only, sorted). Consumed by the discipline picker widget + the resolver's tenant-scope check.
The set of Positions under one Discipline (active only, sorted).
Cached resolver answer for a (tenant, sport_key) pair. Sport-level resolution. Long TTL because slugs are immutable.
invalidatedBy: SportObserver.updated (invalidates every tenant's resolver cache for this slug when a platform row is updated)

keys.description: Cached resolver answer for a (sport_key, discipline_key) pair. Discipline-level resolution.
Cached resolver answer for the full triple. Position-level resolution.
The parsed `data/platform-sports-catalog.json` for a specific version. Static artifact — parsed once, cached indefinitely. Invalidated on deploy when the version suffix advances.
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcileSportReferencesJob run. Read by the health probe + the ops dashboard.
Aggregated downstream reference count for one Sport (sum across every table in `reference_tables`). Read by the deactivate-preview UI + the observer's `is_in_use` check.
invalidatedBy: downstream Wave 3 row INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE with matching sport_key
